metadata.name: wiii-embedding-benchmark-v1
metadata.notes: Representative maritime and traffic-law snippets for offline retrieval benchmarking.

documents.title: COLREGs Rule 15 Crossing Situation
documents.text: Rule 15 requires the vessel that has the other on her starboard side in a crossing situation to keep out of the way and avoid crossing ahead when circumstances permit.

documents.title: COLREGs Rule 16 Give-Way Action
documents.text: Rule 16 states that every vessel directed to keep out of the way shall take early and substantial action to keep well clear.

documents.title: SOLAS Life-Saving Appliances
documents.text: SOLAS Chapter III requires life-saving appliances, emergency drills, and maintenance routines so that crew can abandon ship safely during an emergency.

documents.title: MARPOL Annex VI Emissions
documents.text: MARPOL Annex VI limits sulfur oxide and nitrogen oxide emissions from ships and sets requirements for fuel sulfur content and air pollution prevention.

documents.title: Traffic Law Red Light Violation
documents.text: Running a red light is an administrative traffic violation. Sanctions depend on the vehicle category, the severity of the breach, and whether an accident occurred.

documents.title: Traffic Law Alcohol Concentration
documents.text: Vietnamese traffic enforcement treats alcohol concentration as a strict safety issue. Penalties escalate based on measured concentration and vehicle type.

documents.title: B2 License Conditions
documents.text: A B2 driving license requires age eligibility, training completion, theory and practice exams, and compliance with health standards.

documents.title: Driver Duties After Collision
documents.text: After a collision, a driver must stop, protect the scene, assist injured people when safe, and cooperate with authorities during the incident response.

queries.text: Trong tinh huong cat huong, tau nao phai tranh khi thay tau kia ben man phai?
Tau duoc yeu cau tranh duong phai hanh dong nhu the nao de tranh va cham?
SOLAS quy dinh gi ve phuong tien cuu sinh va drill khan cap?
Annex VI cua MARPOL tap trung vao khi thai nao tu tau bien?
Vuot den do bi xu ly ra sao neu khong gay tai nan?
Nong do con anh huong muc phat giao thong nhu the nao?
Dieu kien de thi bang lai B2 gom nhung gi?
Sau va cham giao thong, tai xe phai dung lai va ho tro ra sao?
